tsTroubleshooting.domains: (topic tsTroubleshooting) (topic hi-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic ut-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic sw-d) (topic ui-d) (topic oce-d) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c task oceTask-c) (topic oceTopic-c tsTroubleshooting oceTroubleshooting-c)
tsTroubleshooting.title: 199010 Take up roll removed during winding

abstract.p: This warning is reported when the take up was not detected anymore during a take up winding action.
This might indicate that there is a problem with the take up roll sensors for both the left and rights side.
Both must be inactive to have a inserted take up roll status.
(0=inserted take up roll, 1=not inserted take up roll)

tsSymptoms.p: Take up roll removed during winding

tsCauses.p: Inside winding functionality used without correct hardware.
Verify if the plastic gear is having an indication of Version 2. See picture.
If not, discuss with the customer if it is wise to order the CI with improved Version 2.

tsDiagnose.p: if there is too much play in the plastic gears of the take up roll.
They might have been worn out and cause play that allows lifting.
If the correct hardware for inside winding is not installed more wear/tear might occur which in the end might cause this warning.
